name: chart
description: A server-rendered interactive-capable chart (bar, line, area, pie, donut, composed) as an accessible inline SVG. Typed @param data (multi-series List<Map<String,String>> or legacy String[]/int[] arrays), --lv-color-chart-N palette tokens, WAI-ARIA role="img" + <title>/<desc> + sr-only <table> fallback. Zero JS baseline; when interactive=true the colocated chart.enhancer.ts is mounted via data-lievit-enhancer="chart" for tooltip, keyboard navigation, series highlight, zoom/pan and lv-chart-mark-click events. No canvas, no client charting library, CSP-clean. PARTIAL (no WIRE Java component) -- the adopting controller builds the series model. v-next re-forge: `label` param renamed to `title`.
docs: Copies the chart partial family: lievit/chart.jte (multi-series server SVG) + chart/legend.jte + chart.css (shimmer, tooltip, mark states) + chart.enhancer.ts (optional interactive layer). Call as @template.lievit.chart(title="Revenue", series=seriesList, type="bar"). For simple single-series pass categories=String[] + values=int[] (legacy bridge). Set interactive=true to mount the enhancer; zoomable=true for brush-zoom. The chart body is always server-rendered SVG; the enhancer overlays only the interactive UX layer.
